title: Duties
doc_html:
§5822.  Duties

The constables shall serve and execute all process to them directed by the judges of the city courts, and shall attend the courts held by them, to keep order therein.

Redesignated from R.S. 33:1732 pursuant to Acts 2011, No. 248, §3.

§5822.  Duties
The constables shall serve and execute all process to them directed by the judges of the city courts, and shall attend the courts held by them, to keep order therein.
Redesignated from R.S. 33:1732 pursuant to Acts 2011, No. 248, §3.
